description: Map the fixture project structure and produce a summary of files, purpose, and current state
prompt: Explore this project. List all files and directories, describe what each file does, identify the current project phase and any known issues. Read @.planning/STATE.md, @.planning/ROADMAP.md, @src/index.js, @src/utils.js, and @tests/utils.test.js. Output a structured summary with sections: Project Overview, File Map, Current State, Known Issues.
